theme: tiny test suite that catches every bug tribe
title: Cross-Family Mutant Kill Suite
strategies: round-robin baseline: split the point budget evenly across the K bug families and aim at a few evenly-spaced mutants per family (the checker's own baseline)

pooled maximum-coverage greedy: repeatedly add the point that kills the most not-yet-killed mutants overall, ignoring family boundaries -- races through the numerous whole-segment families and starves the rare narrow-region families

max-min water-filling / exchange argument: repeatedly add the point that most helps whichever family currently has the smallest kill-fraction, scored by its full cross-family side effect -- directly targets each family's smallest discrimination region
